modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Student can't print to office printers on Wi-Fi.

full_description_text: So, the student was trying to print something. They were connected to eduroam Wi-Fi. But, they just couldn't get it to work with the office printers. It's a bit frustrating, right?
short_description: Student can't print to office printers on Wi-Fi.
description: So, the student was trying to print something. They were connected to eduroam Wi-Fi. But, they just couldn't get it to work with the office printers. It's a bit frustrating, right?
